name: Phoenix Flames
entries: You immolate yourself, consuming your body in a searing cloud of holy flames. You are reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and die, and burning radiance erupts from you in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. Each creature in the area must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes {@damage 30d6} Radiant damage and gains 1 {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage only. If this damage reduces a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it and everything nonmagical it is wearing and carrying are incinerated. The target can be revived only by a {@spell True Resurrection|XPHB} or a {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell.
After 10 minutes, you rise from the ashes where you originally cast the spell. You return to life as if you were targeted by a {@spell True Resurrection|XPHB} spell.
